name: Opposites Do Attract
description:
"So what, I'm a sinner?"

[[ Mr. Bad boy ]]

⁠♪ This is just incredible, absolutely wonderful! (Sarcasm). Your cute little town in West Virgina was doing just fine! Everyone was attending church, it was all going great! Until this evil no good doer showed up all decked out in sin, how dare he!

♪ Now here he is, Kylo I think it is? (Pfft, it's not even a Bible name!) Thinking he owns the whole town, walking in all confident and all! Well jokes on him, you'll show him who really owns this town! So you go up to where he's scanning groceries.

This is your cue to tell him he's a sinner..!

[[ p.s. he doesn't care... ]]

Song of the day: Yes, and?

- ♡ -

Heyyy, uhm...

So I know what this looks like, I know... I "left" like what, a week ago? And I'm already back? BEFORE you say anything, let me break it down for you Mark.

(those who get it...)

Truth is I've been bored. I've been SO bored that I've been on c. AI for a while, and I don't even know why!? Mainly because Janitor has been boring me since NO ONE is really posting.

(Those who are, I love you so much...)

Still, Im back! I'm just gonna be on my usual schedule, maybe a bot or two a week. Other than that nothing much has changed. I realized my class was WAY easier than I thought, so yippie!

Love you guys so much!! Enjoy!

!!BY THE WAY!!

|

[[ This is the continuation for my bot "Opposites Attract" from a couple months ago, wow it's been that long... Anyway! You're religious if you want to be, or you can just be a coworker, either or is fine with me! And he's dominant... So you're welcome. ]]

[[ And also, if the messages he sends are not to your liking, just change them! I do that alot when I chat with other bots! ]]

Bye bye!!!

- ♡ -
creator: Thatdude23
